name: Engram Context Engine
description: Neuroscience-grounded context engine using ACT-R activation decay, Hebbian association, and cognitive working memory instead of FIFO message windowing.

provider.description: Embedding provider for semantic search (default: none = FTS5 only)

autoCapture.description: Automatically store important messages as memories (default: true)

workingMemoryCapacity.description: Max active memory chunks — Miller's Law 7±2 (default: 7)

workingMemoryDecaySec.description: Seconds before working memory item decays (default: 300)

maxRecallResults.description: Max memories to inject into context (default: 10)

embedding.provider.label: Embedding Provider
embedding.provider.help: Optional vector embedding for cross-language semantic recall. FTS5 works well without it.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically detect and store important information from conversations

consolidateAfterTurns.label: Consolidation Interval
consolidateAfterTurns.help: Run Ebbinghaus forgetting + Hebbian strengthening every N turns
